01-policy-safety-compliance.title: Review a policy
01-policy-safety-compliance.body: The embedded onboarded-config CLI serves the customer workspace from disk and renders the policy rule plus required forms.

02-form-client-safety-packet.title: Review a local form
02-form-client-safety-packet.body: The form preview shows the Onboarded form builder surface for the selected local form definition.

03-form-employee-handbook.title: Review another local form
03-form-employee-handbook.body: Selecting another form keeps the browser in preview mode and renders the configured fields and controls.

04-account-source.title: Review account settings
04-account-source.body: The account source remains visible from the embedded workspace served by the onboarded-config CLI.

05-custom-property-badge-number.title: Review custom properties
05-custom-property-badge-number.body: Custom property source files stay available alongside forms, policies, and automations.

06-automation-welcome-email.title: Review automations
06-automation-welcome-email.body: Automation previews summarize triggers, conditions, and workflow steps in the same consumer-driven UI.
